landing.title: GymAccess — Gym Membership Management
landing.description: Automated membership management for small community gyms. Signup, payments, and access control in one place.
landing.ogDescription: Automated membership management for small community gyms.

join.title: Join {gymName} — GymAccess
join.description: Sign up for a membership at {gymName}.

landing.badge: Built for community gyms with 20–200 members

hero.body: GymAccess automates signups, recurring payments, and door access — so you can spend less time on admin and more time on your gym.

spreadsheet.title: Spreadsheet chaos
spreadsheet.body: Tracking members in Excel. Who's paid? Who hasn't? Nobody knows.

chasing.title: Chasing payments
chasing.body: Sending reminders on Vipps, bank transfer, or WhatsApp. Every. Single. Month.

codes.title: Sharing door codes
codes.body: Texting codes manually. Ex-members still have access.

nooverview.title: No overview
nooverview.body: No dashboard. No history. Just your inbox and a prayer.

features.heading: Automate the boring stuff
features.subheading: Everything that used to take hours — now runs itself.

signup.title: Member signup
signup.before: New members message you. You add them to the spreadsheet. Maybe.
signup.after: Share your gym's signup link. Members register and pay themselves.

payments.title: Recurring payments
payments.before: Monthly reminders. Awkward follow-ups. Lost revenue.
payments.after: Stripe handles billing automatically. Failed payments retry. You get notified.

access.title: Access control
access.before: Texting door codes. Changing the code when someone leaves. Forgetting to.
access.after: Codes issued on payment, revoked on cancellation. Supports shared PINs, individual codes, or smart locks.

howItWorks.heading: Up and running in 15 minutes
howItWorks.subheading: No technical skills needed. No hardware required.

step1.title: Create your gym
step1.body: Set your name, price, and billing cycle. That's it.

step2.title: Share your link
step2.body: Every gym gets a signup page. Send it to members.

step3.title: Members pay & get access
step3.body: They sign up via Stripe and receive their door code instantly.

step4.title: You're done
step4.body: Renewals, reminders, and access revocation happen automatically.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.a1: No. If you can fill in a form, you can set up GymAccess. It takes about 15 minutes.
faq.a2: You can add existing members manually from the admin dashboard and send them a signup link to start paying automatically.
faq.q3: What payment methods do members use?
faq.a3: Card payments via Stripe. Members enter their card once and get billed automatically.
faq.a4: You choose: shared PIN for the whole gym, individual codes per member, or smart lock integration with igloohome. Codes are sent automatically on payment and revoked on cancellation.
faq.a5: Yes. No lock-in, no contracts. Cancel from your dashboard.

cta.body: Set up GymAccess in 15 minutes and never chase a payment again.

notFound.title: Gym not found
notFound.body: This signup link may be invalid or expired.

form.heading: Your details

email.label: Email address
email.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

terms.suffix: and understand that my membership will renew automatically until cancelled.
terms.error: You must accept the terms to proceed

form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.security: Secure payments by Stripe · Member data is encrypted

error.title: Payment setup failed
error.missingMember: Missing member information. Please sign up again.
error.connectionError: Could not connect to payment service. Please try again.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.body: Welcome! Your membership is now active. Check your email for your access code.

nextSteps.heading: What happens next?
nextSteps.step1: You will receive a welcome email with your access code
nextSteps.step2: Your membership renews automatically each billing period
nextSteps.step3: Check your email for a link to manage your subscription

error.title: Invalid link
error.body: This manage link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your gym administrator.

states.pastDue: Your last payment failed. Please update your payment method to restore access.
states.cancelled: Your membership has been cancelled. Contact your gym to rejoin.
states.pending: Your membership is pending payment. Check your email for the payment link.
states.suspended: Your membership has been suspended. Please contact your gym administrator.

access.heading: Gym Access
access.subtitle: Use Bluetooth or a PIN code to enter the gym.
access.inactiveWarning: Access controls are only available for active memberships.

bluetooth.recommended: Recommended — unlock hands-free via the igloohome app
bluetooth.step1: Download the igloohome app (App Store or Google Play)
bluetooth.step2: Open the app and tap Receive Access
bluetooth.step3: Enter or paste the key above
bluetooth.step4: The lock will appear in your app — tap it to unlock via Bluetooth

pin.subtitle: Backup option — a 2-hour PIN code for the keypad
pin.label: Door PIN

banner.text: This page is available in Norwegian.

stripeNotConnected.title: Stripe not connected.
stripeNotConnected.body: Your members won't be able to pay until you connect your Stripe account.

stripePending.title: Stripe setup incomplete.
stripePending.body: Finish your Stripe onboarding to start accepting member payments.

saasPastDue.title: Payment issue with your Pro subscription.
saasPastDue.body: Update your payment method to keep the 1% transaction fee.

saasStarter.body: You're on the Starter plan (3% transaction fee).

confirmSuspend.title: Suspend {name}?
confirmSuspend.body: This will revoke their access code. They can be reactivated later.

confirmCancel.title: Cancel membership for {name}?
confirmCancel.body: This will cancel their Stripe subscription and revoke access. This cannot be undone.
